acceptance_criteria: Multi-cell edit with pricing preservation and autosave proof on the live Orders document route.

assertions.label: Pricing recalculation logic is unit-tested for all editable fields
assertions.expected: onCellValueChanged triggers calculateLineItemFromRetailPrice for quantity, cogsPerUnit, unitPrice, and marginPercent edits.
assertions.observed: Unit tests at OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (lines 291, 434) confirm recalculation for quantity and pricing fields, including revert on invalid values

assertions.label: Fill Price action propagates focused-row pricing to all selected rows
assertions.expected: Fill Price button applies focused row's unitPrice to all items and recalculates lineTotals.
assertions.observed: Unit tests at OrdersDocumentLineItemsGrid.test.tsx (lines 210, 238) confirm Fill Price by focused-row-id and by display index

assertions.label: Live Orders document route is not reachable for this proof session
assertions.expected: A fresh reachable Orders document route exists on a deployed build for live multi-cell edit proof.
assertions.observed: Proof budget exhausted (0 fresh deployed reruns remaining). Prior attempts on SALE-ORD-020 were blocked on live document-grid reachability.

blocker_detail.reason: Proof budget is exhausted and no fresh reachable Orders document route is available from this environment. The handoff explicitly states: park until a fresh reachable Orders document route exists.
blocker_detail.code_readiness: Pricing recalculation, Fill Price, multi-field edit, and invalid-edit revert are all implemented and unit-tested. The code paths are verified locally.
blocker_detail.unblock_condition: A fresh reachable Orders document route on a deployed staging build, followed by one isolated multi-cell edit probe with before/after values and save-state evidence.
blocker_detail.prior_attempts: SALE-ORD-020 was blocked on live Orders document-grid reachability on staging, not local implementation certainty.
